steps: Go to https://www.linkedin.com/developers/ and log in with your LinkedIn account
Click 'Create app' in the top-right corner
Fill in the required fields: App name, LinkedIn Page (must be an existing Company Page you manage), App logo, and Privacy Policy URL
Navigate to the 'Auth' tab of your newly created app
Under 'OAuth 2.0 settings', add your Redirect URL (e.g., https://yourapp.com/callback)
Copy the 'Client ID' shown on the Auth tab
Click the eye icon next to 'Client Secret' to reveal it, then copy it
Under 'Products', request access to the products you need (e.g., 'Share on LinkedIn', 'Sign In with LinkedIn using OpenID Connect')
notes: A LinkedIn Company Page is required to create an app — you must be an admin of that page
Product access (e.g., 'Share on LinkedIn') must be explicitly requested and may require review
The 'Sign In with LinkedIn using OpenID Connect' product grants openid, profile, and email scopes
The 'w_member_social' scope for posting requires the 'Share on LinkedIn' product to be approved
Redirect URIs must use HTTPS in production
Free developer access available but posting capabilities require product approval

test_endpoint.description: Verify credentials by fetching the authenticated user's OpenID Connect profile (requires openid scope)
